Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
12.8.9 Sea Lion Cove
A shallow inlet at the
base
of the cliffs of the Southern
Vashnars
, Sea Lion
Cove opens out onto the Southern Sea. The path into the cove follows the
treacherous ledges of the cliffs, ending at a narrow beach. The rocky waters
of the cove are watched over by a lighthouse, and Simmons, captain of the
lighthouse watches over the cove's inhabitants with a stalwart vigilance.
The gentle sea lions, for which the cove was named, bask on the beach and
frolic in the waters of the cove.
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
